scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/shared-types && npm run build --prefix packages/prompt-kit && npm run build --prefix packages/model-adapter && npm run build --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/shared-types && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/prompt-kit && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/model-adapter && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/api && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/extension
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix packages/shared-types && npm run lint --prefix packages/prompt-kit && npm run lint --prefix packages/model-adapter && npm run lint --prefix apps/api && npm run lint --prefix apps/extension
